---
title: Quick start
---

To gain access to iThenticate you can contact your [Key-User](key_users.qmd) of your faculty. Your faculty's Key-user can request an account for you. 

Once an [account](cost_access.qmd) has been created for you, you will receive an email from Turnitin. You can then [log in](log_in.qmd) and perform [your first scan](first_scan.qmd). 

iThenticate allows you to [save, share and export](tools/ithenticate/exporting_results.qmd) your results. These results can be discussed and [interperted](similarity_scores.qmd) together with your supervisor. 

You can also adjust your similarity check settings or run a [doc-to-doc](doc_to_doc_comparison.qmd) comparison. These options can be found in the Advanced Settings section under Documentation.
